case_title: PURITA ABERILA VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: APPENDIX OF NON-CALIFORNIA AUTHORITIES CITED IN DEFT'S REPLY FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
OPPOSITION TO DEFTS' DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABERILA, PURITA AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., A CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO 5/16/11 FOR THE OPPOSING PARTY TO PROVIDE DEPT. 301 WITH ENDORSED-FILED COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) NO LATER THAN 5/6/11 JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-20-2011 CONTINUED TO JUL-01-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABERILA, PURITA AN INDIVIDUAL ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5; SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE REMAINING CLAIMS TO PLEAD, INTER ALIA, FACTS SUPPORTING TOLLING THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, THE CLAIMED FRAUD WITH THE REQUIRED SPECIFICITY, THE BREACHED PROVISIONS OF THE CONTRACT, THE BASIS FOR DEFENDANT OWING A DUTY TO PLAINTIFF AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 6 AND 8 AND FACTS SHOWING THAT FINANCIAL CODE 4970 APPLIES TO PLAINTIFF'S LOAN. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR # 6840
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-16-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO GIVE PLAINTIFF A FINAL OPPORTUNITY TO ALLEGE THAT HER DELAYED DISCOVERY WAS EXCUSABLE AND THAT SHE EXERCISED DILIGENCE, TO PLEAD THE ALLEGED FRAUD WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY AS TO THE MISREPRESENTATION AND WHO MADE IT AND WHEN, TO PLEAD THE SPECIFIC CONTRACT TERM BREACHED AND THE CONDUCT THAT BREACHED IT OR AN IMPLIED COVENANT AND TO PLEAD A BASIS FOR A FIDUCIARY DUTY OR A DUTY IN NEGLIGENCE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN CSR #8189
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
